message:
fix(ci): use Node.js 24 for npm OIDC trusted publishing

npm >= 11.5 (Node.js 24) is required for proper OIDC support.
Added registry-url for setup-node to configure npm authentication.

files.patch:
@@ -81,7 +81,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: '20'
+          node-version: '24'
+          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'
 
       - name: Publish to npm (OIDC)
         run: npm publish --provenance --access public
